scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer and the v2 library, but the gold standard focuses on the data schema (app databag: name/model/port, unit databag: host) which the agent omits entirely. The agent provides Python API details that the gold standard notes are not covered by charmlibs docs.
scores.hallucination_notes: Several API details cannot be verified against the gold standard: IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent event class names, is_ready() method, strip_prefix constructor parameter, ingress.on.ready/revoked event attributes. The gold standard only confirms the IngressPerAppRequirer class name exists. These may be real but are unverifiable and potentially fabricated.
